channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 13.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham needed to distance himself from Starmer’s ‘toxic’ Labour to boost hopes of by-election win, allies say
item.description: Burnham needed to distance himself from Starmer’s ‘toxic’ Labour to boost hopes of by-election win, allies say

item.title: BBC Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work?
item.description: How would a Labour leadership contest work?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: My views on EU may have influenced Boris Johnson’s decision to back Brexit, says ex-wife
item.description: My views on EU may have influenced Boris Johnson’s decision to back Brexit, says ex-wife

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Downing Street rejects US claim of ‘two-tiered policing’ over Henry Nowak death - UK politics live
item.description: Downing Street rejects US claim of ‘two-tiered policing’ over Henry Nowak death - UK politics live

item.title: The Telegraph: Andy Burnham pledges to cut business rates for pubs - The Telegraph
item.description: Andy Burnham pledges to cut business rates for pubs - The Telegraph

item.title: i Politics: What Burnham as PM could mean for your taxes
item.description: What Burnham as PM could mean for your taxes

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Lammy hits back at Trump administration’s ‘two-tier policing’ claim over Henry Nowak’s murder
item.description: Lammy hits back at Trump administration’s ‘two-tier policing’ claim over Henry Nowak’s murder

item.title: ConservativeHome: Lord Ashcroft: 'His heart’s in Manchester' 'It’s a stepping stone for him' - My focus groups on the Makerfield by-election
item.description: Lord Ashcroft: 'His heart’s in Manchester' 'It’s a stepping stone for him' - My focus groups on the Makerfield by-election

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham and Farage are more similar than either would like to admit - The Telegraph
item.description: Burnham and Farage are more similar than either would like to admit - The Telegraph

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Terrific newsletter by @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social today: what does Manchester “do differently” from other conurbations, and what are the lessons and hints about how Andy Burnham might or should govern?
item.description: Terrific newsletter by @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social today: what does Manchester “do differently” from other conurbations, and what are the lessons and hints about how Andy Burnham might or should govern?
